name: [BUG-008] Username accepts single-character values
description:
Expected: 400 when username is shorter than 3 characters (minimum length policy).
        Actual:   201 — a 1-character username like 'x' is accepted without validation.
descriptionHtml:
Expected: 400 when username is shorter than 3 characters (minimum length policy).
    Actual:   201 — a 1-character username like 'x' is accepted without validation.
statusMessage:
XFAIL BUG-008: Register does not enforce minimum username length

AssertionError: Expected 400 for single-character username but no minimum length is enforced
assert 201 == 400
 +  where 201 = <WrapperTestResponse streamed [201 CREATED]>.status_code

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-008: Register does not enforce minimum username length')

tags: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-008: Register does not enforce minimum username length')
